title: Grofers Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Grofers Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
